case_title: ALBERTO GONZALES VS. SUNG CHUK CHUNG

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, ALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, SUNG CHUK AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA T.C. CONSTRUCTION & PAINTING COMPANY $4,423.56 PRINCIPAL, $12.03 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,591.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
